textByHash.069fb51b0c956bfee306fe82c5f415c192b1f7f4: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed to use any Melee attacks. Do you still want to proceed?
textByHash.09967e17afd583934462ddc82f0bdd5d6ed5034f: You need to arrange a challenge with me before you enter the arena.
textByHash.20ea974b198bac238b114ee056fa328cbda593c8: That's great, now go show who's interested.
textByHash.4884a808f45566a92a73da1315284c59da6146e4: You've already got a champion waiting for you.
textByHash.5c2ab04710d418d1a1b08f58a92e8e2dd1ec7558: I'm afraid you don't have space to take it.
textByHash.5de3c272046a4ef2233ecdf0afc674f85330cd52: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're only allowed to use Ranged attacks, no Melee or Magic. Do you still want to proceed?
textByHash.5e34653677612387d593f4550ac11fbf6cb1825a: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed any Weapons or Armour. Do you still want to proceed?
textByHash.720dd1f592c6fe826ee483767c9a905126da068d: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed to use any Special Attacks. Do you still want to proceed?
textByHash.734cf6cebf34f6620d053536a92ab8fe857a9769: Leon d'Cour has issued you a challenge. He has stated there will be no items allowed except those you're wearing. Do you want to accept the challenge?
textByHash.8329f3042c8033c1ab43b1859c88dc52e772de60: This is the champions' arena. The champions of various races use it to duel those they deem worthy of the honour. If you find a challenge scroll in your travels, bring it here to face your challenger.
textByHash.8764ca018421838f9867e96aab62047b9d51acba: Have a look in the chest by the Wall of Defeated Champions, on the north side of this gallery. I think you'll find something in there for you.
textByHash.9e6c84b37af73d18f5f9440ed67aeea5706698e8: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're only allowed to take Weapons, no other items are allowed. Do you still want to proceed?
textByHash.a4c01649a56108d0b2d6af9f8a181c1862137b53: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed to use any Ranged attacks. Do you still want to proceed?
textByHash.a99efda32aa877a7fc6e22afab3220d2447c7370: You're holding it already. Go and rub your lamp.
textByHash.b5ed72ad87bcfb2fc447a15d3ef8ab96f4a12d01: Hand it to me, and we'll get you started.
textByHash.b5f826e1c5cd453c2edab535465db55daad777d5: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed to use any Magic attacks. Do you still want to proceed?
textByHash.b92fe70c264f05db84c2adc0b9080ea8ae23fbac: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed to use any Prayers. Do you still want to proceed?
textByHash.c4465877086790302ef8ec1f52881e32df84c769: You've already defeated this Champion. The challenge is void.
textByHash.c6510eb08326af2d8eaf3db04dcfa00e9be76ed4: Is there something I can help you with?
textByHash.c6b9c9360b0cf87cd555e8de2b59768e360be15b: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're only allowed to use Magic attacks, no Melee or Ranged. Do you still want to proceed?
textByHash.d1829130e6225a62f56284d1ee22c36fcf7f2d52: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're only allowed to use Melee attacks, no Ranged or Magic. Do you still want to proceed?
textByHash.e0a3750104332124b4337a0d6e66fb499a556804: I believe I mentioned you're only allowed to use Ranged in this duel.
textByHash.e2f47380f2065cd2d242b35298d5e60f5b8eaf82: I don't think I've got anything more for you.
textByHash.e56d3e80e1d1548b5f378f614eb629109de43827: Your challenger is ready! Please go down through the trapdoor when you're ready.
textByHash.e753bf2fcbf9a9e34e3dadccc764ea9e72fdf5d4: I believe I mentioned you're only allowed to take Weapons into this duel.
textByHash.e8d735cd01e586d9dfee890fbccaa2c3349f056a: There's a ladder for a reason.
textByHash.f908369319fd0500591f7ee32d67d2cb749b719c: Welcome back, champion! Leon d'Cour has granted you his cloak for you to wear as a sign of your accomplishment. Do you want it now? Or do you want something else?
